steps.t: Frideric the Elder is in Ost Guruth, the Ruin-hold in the Lone-lands. Mithrandir believes the Eglain of the Lone-lands may know something about the co…
Cythred is on the hill of Weathertop, in the Lone-lands.
Séca is on Weathertop. You have defended Cythred from an attack, and now his assistant Séca wishes to thank you.
Séca of the Eglain told you to consult with Newbold Leafcutter in the Scholar's Stair Archives in the Town of Bree.
Newbold Leafcutter is in the Scholar's Stair Archive in the Town of Bree.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Sceptre of Cardolan, a…
